div.p: Zero-Copy Pub/Sub Implementation (zcmb-m4) Internal Memory Alignment & Access Patterns
1. Memory Alignment: The RetainedMessage struct is aligned to 8-byte boundaries (64-bit). The trailing padding: u8 at +0x27 ensures that an array of these structs remains aligned.

ul.li: Literal Lookup: O(1) average via unordered_map.
Wildcard Scan: O(N) where N is total retained count. For production, consider a specialized Topic Trie to reduce scan time to O(L) where L is topic depth.
